zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine Knyvett於1564年出生在英國維爾爾查爾頓 聖 彼得時，她的父親Sir Henry Knyvett27歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Stumpe24歲。她與Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1638年9月8日在英國英格蘭艾可享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine Knyvett于1564年出生在英国維爾爾查爾頓 聖 彼得时，她的父亲Sir Henry Knyvett27岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Stumpe24岁。她与Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1638年9月8日在英国英格兰艾可享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登。

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine Knyvett was born in 1564, in Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir Henry Knyvett, was 27 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Stumpe, was 24. She married Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 8 September 1638, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Katherine Knyvett est née en 1564, à Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Knyvett, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Stumpe, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 septembre 1638, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Katherine Knyvett 1564 in Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Knyvett 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Stumpe 24. Sie hat Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. September 1638 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Knyvett è nata il nel 1564 nel Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Knyvett, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Stumpe, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1638, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Saffron Walden, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Knyvettが1564年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチャールトン スト ペターで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Knyvettは27歳，母Lady Elizabeth Stumpeは24歳であった。Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1638年9月8日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Knyvett(이)가 1564년 영국 윌츠히르 찰턴 스트 피터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Knyvett(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Stumpe(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1638년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 사프런 월든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Knyvett nasceu em 1564, em Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Knyvett, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Stumpe, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1638, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine Knyvett родилась в 1564 г. в местности чарлтон ст питир, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Knyvett было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Stumpe, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 8 сентября 1638 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Howard Earl of Suffolk. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas.
